title: Refuge

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hear my whispered prayer at dawn
When morning breaks and hope is born
My King, my God, to You I call
Before Your throne I humbly fall
In silence wait for You alone
To guide me from Your holy throne

sections.label: Chorus
lines: For You are not a God who smiles
On wickedness and crafted lies
But in Your love, You shelter me
Under wings of mercy, set me free

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Evil cannot dwell with You
Their tongues spin webs of half-truths
But I, by grace, will enter in
Your house of light, where peace begins
In reverent fear, I bow my head
Where righteous paths before me spread

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Lead me, Lord, in righteousness
When enemies press in to test
Make Your way straight before my feet
Let justice and Your mercy meet

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: For You will bless the righteous soul
With favor like a shield of gold
Let all who trust in You rejoice
Forever lifting up their voice

sections.label: Outro
lines: In morning light, I seek Your face
My refuge in this sacred space
My King, my God, hear my prayer
Your love surrounds me everywhere

epigraph: and in thy fear will I worship toward thy holy temple
